title: alysicarpus glumaceus
intro: Alysicarpus glumaceus, also known as the Indian horsefly or horsefly bean, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of various alkaloids and flavonoids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Alysicarpus glumaceus include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit anti-diabetic and anti-cancer properties. Traditional herbal preparations include making a decoction or infusion from the roots or leaves of the plant, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
